## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content fix or clarification
- [ ] Source/citation update
- [ ] Deck-source update
- [ ] Code-sample update
- [ ] Site code or styling
- [ ] Workflow/release change
- [ ] Other

## Affected Areas

List the pages, files, or workflows affected.

## Validation

Commands run:

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint:links`
- [ ] `npm run check:export`
- [ ] Code-sample tests, if applicable:

## Review Notes

Call out anything reviewers should inspect closely, including legal/procurement/security wording, local-review caveats, screenshots, or live-credential test gaps.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets or private data are included.
- [ ] Real agency examples are public, permissioned, anonymized, or synthetic.
- [ ] Vendor-specific claims are sourced or removed.
